Petition To Determine Title To And Require Transfer Of Trust Property To Estate [Probate Code Sec. 850(A)(2)(C)
Off Calendar Jun-24-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Joesph Zimmerl appeared via zoom for Ercel Buenaventura Cruz (petitioner).

Counsel stated that they have been searching for the trust, but they've been unsuccessful, and that the property is deteriorating so they need to sell the property. The matter is taken under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Thompson. Not reported.

Petition To Determine Title To And Require Transfer Of Trust Property To Estate [Probate Code Sec. 850(A)(2)(C)
Off Calendar Apr-22-2025 Continued To Jun-24-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Arish S. Gill for Ercel Buenaventura Cruz, Petitioner (via CourtCall).

The Court expressed continued concern regarding the possible existence of a trust. Although a declaration was submitted asserting no trust exists, the Court indicated that further due diligence is needed. Mr. Gill stated efforts would be made to identify the drafting attorney and bolster the record.

The court continued the matter to June 24, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
